zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Stanley於大約1292年出生在英國爾胡頓時，他的父親William Stanley43歲，母親Joan de Bamville29歲。他於大約1311年與Mabel Mabella Hawkset在英國爾斯托雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾金巴享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Stanley was born about 1292, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, his father, William Stanley, was 43 and his mother, Joan de Bamville, was 29. He married Mabel Mabella Hawkset about 1311, in Storeton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1361, in Kinver, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il est décédé en 1361, à Kinver, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Stanleyが約1292年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父William Stanleyは43歳，母Joan de Bamvilleは29歳であった。約1311年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンでMabel Mabella Hawksetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアキンバーで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Stanley(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stanley(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Bamville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1311년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 Mabel Mabella Hawkset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 킨버에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Stanley родился около 1292 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Stanley было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bamville, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Mabella Hawkset около 1311 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.
